Title: The Disappearance of Haruhi Suzumiya
Plot: A week before Christmas, Kyon wakes up in a world where the SOS Brigade doesn't exist. Mikuru and Yuki don't recognize him, and Haruhi and Itsuki seem to have vanished.
Tagline: Am I happier in the world that had Haruhi in it, or the one where she disappeared?
